.fixedRate(fixedRate)\n255:           .yearFraction(period.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n256:           .build());\n257:     }\n258:     // last period - accrual end is modified\n259: .startDate(modifiedPeriod.getStartDate())\n264:         .endDate(modifiedPeriod.getEndDate())\n265:         .unadjustedStartDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n266:        .currency(currency)\n272:         .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n273:         .yearFraction(modifiedPeriod.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n274:         .build());\n275:     ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods = accrualPeriods.build();\n276: \n277:     return ResolvedCdsIndex.builder()\n278:         .buySell(buySell)\n279:         .cdsIndexId(cdsIndexId)\n280:         .legalEntityIds(legalEntityIds)\n281:         .protectionStart(protectionStart)\n282:         .paymentOnDefault(paymentOnDefault)\n283: */\n135:   public LocalDate getAccrualStartDate() {\n136:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getStartDate();\n137:   }\n138: \n139:   /**\n140:    * Obtains the accrual end date.\n141:    * \n142:    * }\n165: \n166:   /**\n167:    * Obtains the fixed coupon rate.\n168:    * \n169:    * @return the fixed rate\n170:    */\n171:   public double getFixedRate() {\n172:     return the step-in date. \n178:    * \n179:    * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\n180:    * @return the effective start date\n181:    */\n182:   public LocalDate calculateEffectiveStartDate(LocalDate stepinDate) {\n183:     LocalDate startDate = stepinDate.isAfter(getAccrualStartDate()) ? stepinDate : getAccrualStartDate();\n184:     return protectionStart.isBeginning() ? startDate.minusDays(1) : startDate;\n185:   }\n186: \n187:   /**\n188:    * Calculates the settlement date from the valuation date.\n189:    * \n190:    * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n191:    * @param refData  the reference data to use\n192:    * @return the settlement date\n193:    */\n194:   public LocalDate calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(LocalDate valuationDate, ReferenceData refData) {\n195:     return settlementDateOffset.adjust(valuationDate, refData);\n196:   }\n197: \n198:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n199:   /**\n200:    * Finds the period that contains the specified date.\n201:    * <p>\n202:    * The search is performed using unadjusted dates.\n203:    * \n204:    * @param date  the date to find the period for\n205:    * @return the period, empty if not found\n206:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if more than one period matches\n207:    */\n208:   public Optional<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> findPeriod(LocalDate date) {\n209:     return paymentPeriods.stream()\n210:         .filter(p -> p.contains(date))\n211:         .reduce(ensureOnlyOne());\n212:   }\n213: \n214:   /**\n215:    * Calculates the accrued premium per fractional spread for unit notional.\n216:    * \n217:    * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\n218:    * @return the accrued year fraction\n219:    */\n220:   public double accruedYearFraction(LocalDate stepinDate) {\n221:     if (stepinDate.isBefore(getAccrualStartDate())) {\n222:       return 0d;\n223:     }\n224:     if (stepinDate.isEqual(getAccrualEndDate())) {\n225:       return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getYearFraction();\n226:     }\n227:     CreditCouponPaymentPeriod period = findPeriod(stepinDate)\n228:         .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException(\"Date outside range\"));\n229:     return dayCount.relativeYearFraction(period.getStartDate(), stepinDate);\n230:   }\n231: \n232: }\\n111: \\n112:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n113:   /**\\n114:    * Calculates the present value of the CDS index product.\\n115:    * <p>\\n116:    * The present value of the product is based on {@code referenceDate}.\\n117:    * This is typically the valuation date, or cash settlement date if the product is associated with a {@code Trade}. \\n118:    * <p>\\n119:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty present value, see {@link PriceType}. \\n120:    * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\n121:    * \\n122:    * @param cdsIndex  the product\\n123:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n124:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\n125:    * @param priceType  the price type\\n126:    * @param refData  the reference data\\n127:    * @return the present value\\n128:    */\\n129:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n130:       ResolvedCdsIndex cdsIndex,\\n131:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n132:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\n133:       PriceType priceType,\\n134:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n135: \\n136:     if (isExpired(cdsIndex, ratesProvider)) {\\n137:       return CurrencyAmount.of(cdsIndex.getCurrency(), 0d);\\n138:     }\\n139:     ResolvedCds cds = cdsIndex.toSingleNameCds();\\n140:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\n141:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\n142:     double recoveryRate = underlyingPricer.recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\n143:     Triple<CreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities, Double> rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\n144:     double protectionLeg = (1d - recoveryRate) *\\n145:         underlyingPricer.protectionFull(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate);\\n146:     double rpv01 = underlyingPricer.riskyAnnuity(\\n147:         cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, priceType);\\n148:     double amount =\\n149:         cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional()) * rates.getThird() * (protectionLeg - rpv01 * cds.getFixedRate());\\n150:     return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), amount);\\n151:   }\\n152: \\n153:   /**\\n154:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the product. \\n155:    * <p>\\n156:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of present value to the underlying curves.\\n157:    * \\n158:    * @param cdsIndex  the product \\n159:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n160:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\n161:    * @param refData  the reference data\\n162:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n163:    */\\n164:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivity(\\n165:       ResolvedCdsIndex cdsIndex,\\n166:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n167:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\n168:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n169: \\n170:     if (isExpired(cdsIndex, ratesProvider)) {\\n171:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n172:     }\\n173:     ResolvedCds cds = cdsIndex.toSingleNameCds();\\n174:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\n175:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\n176:     double recoveryRate = underlyingPricer.recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\n177:     Triple<CreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities, Double> rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\n178: \\n179:     double signedNotional = cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional());\\n180:     PointSensitivityBuilder protectionLegSensi = underlyingPricer.protectionLegSensitivity(\\n181:         cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate, org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.StandardId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DaysAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.PeriodicSchedule;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.Schedule;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.SchedulePeriod;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Product;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\n\n/**\n * A CDS tranche product, representing a synthetic CDO tranche.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche is a slice of credit risk from a CDS index portfolio, defined by\n * attachment and detachment points that determine the subordination level.\n * The protection buyer pays fixed coupons and receives protection for losses\n * within the [attachmentPoint, detachmentPoint] range.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class CdsTranche\n    implements Product, Resolvable<ResolvedCdsTranche>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the CDS tranche is buy or sell.\n   * <p>\n   * A value of 'Buy' implies buying protection, where the fixed coupon is paid\n   * and the protection is received in the event of default.\n   * A value of 'Sell' implies selling protection, where the fixed coupon is received\n   * and the protection is paid in the event of default.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final BuySell buySell;\n  /**\n   * The underlying CDS index identifier.\n   * <p>\n   * This identifier is used to refer to the underlying CDS index.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final StandardId cdsIndexId;\n  /**\n   * The legal entity identifiers.\n   * <p>\n   * These identifiers refer to the reference legal entities of the underlying CDS index.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ImmutableList<StandardId> legalEntityIds;\n  /**\n   * The attachment point of the tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the lower boundary of the tranche, expressed as a fraction between 0 and 1.\n   * Losses below this level are absorbed by more subordinate tranches.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegative\")\n  private final double attachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The detachment point of the tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the upper boundary of the tranche, expressed as a fraction between 0 and 1.\n   * Losses above this level are absorbed by more senior tranches.\n   * Must be greater than the attachment point.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegative\")\n  private final double detachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The currency of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The amounts of the notional are expressed in terms of this currency.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Currency currency;\n  /**\n   * The notional amount, must be non-negative.\n   * <p>\n   * The fixed notional amount applicable during the lifetime of the CDS tranche.\n   * The currency of the notional is specified by {@code currency}.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegativeOrZero\")\n  private final double notional;\n  /**\n   * The payment schedule.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to define the payment periods.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PeriodicSchedule paymentSchedule;\n  /**\n   * The fixed coupon rate.\n   * <p>\n   * This must be represented in decimal form.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegative\")\n  private final double fixedRate;\n  /**\n   * The day count convention.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Act/360'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DayCount dayCount;\n  /**\n   * The payment on default.\n   * <p>\n   * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'AccruedPremium'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\n  /**\n   * The protection start of the day.\n   * <p>\n   * When the protection starts on the start date.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Beginning'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\n   * <p>\n   * The step-in date is also called protection effective date.\n   * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 1 calendar day.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\n   * <p>\n   * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 3 business days in the calendar of the payment schedule.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.dayCount = DayCounts.ACT_360;\n    builder.paymentOnDefault = PaymentOnDefault.ACCRUED_PREMIUM;\n    builder.protectionStart = ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING;\n    builder.stepinDateOffset = DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1);\n  }\n\n  @ImmutablePreBuild\n  private static void preBuild(Builder builder) {\n    if (builder.settlementDateOffset == null && builder.paymentSchedule != null) {\n      builder.settlementDateOffset =\n          DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, builder.paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().getCalendar());\n    }\n  }\n\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(attachmentPoint < detachmentPoint,\n        \"Attachment point must be less than detachment point\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(detachmentPoint <= 1.0,\n        \"Detachment point must be at most 1.0\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ImmutableSet<Currency> allCurrencies() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedCdsTranche resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    Schedule adjustedSchedule = paymentSchedule.createSchedule(refData);\n    ImmutableList.Builder<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> accrualPeriods = ImmutableList.builder();\n    int nPeriods = adjustedSchedule.size();\n    for (int i = 0; i < nPeriods - 1; i++) {\n      SchedulePeriod period = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(i);\n      accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n          .startDate(period.getStartDate())\n          .endDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .unadjustedStartDate(period.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n          .unadjustedEndDate(period.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n          .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : period.getStartDate())\n          .effectiveEndDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getEndDate().minusDays(1) : period.getEndDate())\n          .paymentDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .notional(notional)\n          .currency(currency)\n          .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n          .yearFraction(period.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n          .build());\n    }\n    // last period - accrual end is modified\n    SchedulePeriod lastPeriod = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(nPeriods - 1);\n    LocalDate accEndDate = protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getEndDate().plusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getEndDate();\n    SchedulePeriod modifiedPeriod = lastPeriod.toBuilder().endDate(accEndDate).build();\n    accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n        .startDate(modifiedPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .endDate(modifiedPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .unadjustedStartDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n        .unadjustedEndDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n        .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .effectiveEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .paymentDate(paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().adjust(lastPeriod.getEndDate(), refData))\n        .notional(notional)\n        .currency(currency)\n        .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n        .yearFraction(modifiedPeriod.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n        .build());\n    ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods = accrualPeriods.build();\n\n    return ResolvedCdsTranche.builder()\n        .buySell(buySell)\n        .cdsIndexId(cdsIndexId)\n        .legalEntityIds(legalEntityIds)\n        .attachmentPoint(attachmentPoint)\n        .detachmentPoint(detachmentPoint)\n        .paymentPeriods(paymentPeriods)\n        .protectionEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .dayCount(dayCount)\n        .paymentOnDefault(paymentOnDefault)\n        .protectionStart(protectionStart)\n        .stepinDateOffset(stepinDateOffset)\n        .settlementDateOffset(settlementDateOffset)\n        .build();\n paymentSchedule.createSchedule(refData);\n    ImmutableList.Builder<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> accrualPeriods = ImmutableList.builder();\n    int nPeriods = adjustedSchedule.size();\n    for (int i = 0; i < nPeriods - 1; i++) {\n      SchedulePeriod period = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(i);\n      accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n          .startDate(period.getStartDate())\n com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\n\n/**\n * A CDS tranche product, representing a synthetic CDO tranche.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche is a slice of credit risk from a CDS index portfolio, defined by\n * attachment and detachment points that determine the subordination level.\n * The protection buyer pays fixed coupons and receives protection for losses\n * within the [attachmentPoint, detachmentPoint] range.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class CdsTranche\n    implements Product, Resolvable<ResolvedCdsTranche>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the CDS tranche is buy or sell.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final BuySell buySell;\n  /**\n   * The underlying CDS index identifier.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final StandardId cdsIndexId;\n  /**\n   * The legal entity identifiers.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ImmutableList<StandardId> legalEntityIds;\n  /**\n   * The attachment point of the tranche, expressed as a fraction between 0 and 1.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double attachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The detachment point of the tranche, expressed as a fraction between 0 and 1.\n   * Must be greater than the attachment point.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double detachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The currency of the CDS tranche.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Currency currency;\n  /**\n   * The notional amount, must be non-negative.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegativeOrZero\")\n  private final double notional;\n  /**\n   * The payment schedule.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private /**\n   * The day count convention.\n   * Defaults to 'Act/360'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DayCount dayCount;\n  /**\n   * The payment on default.\n   * Defaults to 'AccruedPremium'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\n  /**\n   * The protection start of the day.\n   * Defaults to 'Beginning'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\n   * Defaults to 1 calendar day.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\n   * Defaults to 3 business days.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.dayCount = DayCounts.ACT_360;\n    builder.paymentOnDefault = PaymentOnDefault.ACCRUED_PREMIUM;\n    builder.protectionStart = ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING;\n    builder.stepinDateOffset = DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1);\n  }\n\n  @ImmutablePreBuild\n  private static void preBuild(Builder builder) {\n    if (builder.settlementDateOffset == null && builder.paymentSchedule != null) {\n      builder.settlementDateOffset =\n          DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, builder.paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().getCalendar());\n    }\n  }\n\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(attachmentPoint >= 0d && attachmentPoint < 1d,\n        \"attachmentPoint must be in [0, 1)\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(detachmentPoint > 0d && detachmentPoint <= 1d,\n        \"detachmentPoint must be in (0, 1]\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(attachmentPoint < detachmentPoint,\n        \"attachmentPoint must be less than detachmentPoint\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ImmutableSet<Currency> allCurrencies() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedCdsTranche resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    Schedule adjustedSchedule = paymentSchedule.createSchedule(refData);\n    ImmutableList.Builder<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> accrualPeriods = ImmutableList.builder();\n    int nPeriods = adjustedSchedule.size();\n    for (int i = 0; i < nPeriods - 1; i++) {\n      SchedulePeriod period = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(i);\n      accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n          .startDate(period.getStartDate())\n          .endDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .unadjustedStartDate(period.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n          .unadjustedEndDate(period.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n          .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : period.getStartDate())\n          .effectiveEndDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getEndDate().minusDays(1) : period.getEndDate())\n          .paymentDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .notional(notional)\n          .currency(currency)\n          .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n          .yearFraction(period.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n          .build());\n    }\n    // last period - accrual end is modified\n    SchedulePeriod lastPeriod = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(nPeriods - 1);\n    LocalDate accEndDate = protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getEndDate().plusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getEndDate();\n    SchedulePeriod modifiedPeriod = lastPeriod.toBuilder().endDate(accEndDate).build();\n    accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n        .startDate(modifiedPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .endDate(modifiedPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .unadjustedStartDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n        .unadjustedEndDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n        .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .effectiveEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .paymentDate(paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().adjust(lastPeriod.getEndDate(), refData))\n        .notional(notional)\n        .currency(currency)\n        .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n        .yearFraction(modifiedPeriod.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n        .build());\n    ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods = accrualPeriods.build();\n\n    return accrual end date.\n   * @return the accrual end date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getAccrualEndDate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getEndDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * LocalDate startDate = stepinDate.isAfter(getAccrualStartDate()) ? stepinDate : getAccrualStartDate();\n    return protectionStart.isBeginning() ? startDate.minusDays(1) : startDate;\n  }\n\n  /**\n public LocalDate calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(LocalDate valuationDate, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return settlementDateOffset.adjust(valuationDate, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Finds the period that contains the specified date.\n   * @param date  the date to find the period for\n   * @return the period, empty if not found\n   */\n  public Optional<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> findPeriod(LocalDate date) {\n    return paymentPeriods.stream()\n        .filter(p -> p.contains(date))\n        .reduce(ensureOnlyOne());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the accrued year fraction for unit notional.\n   * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\n   * @return the accrued year fraction\n   */\n  public double accruedYearFraction(LocalDate stepinDate) {\n    if (stepinDate.isBefore(getAccrualStartDate())) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    if (stepinDate.isEqual(getAccrualEndDate())) {\n IllegalArgumentException(\"Date outside range\"));\n    return dayCount.relativeYearFraction(period.getStartDate(), stepinDate);\n  }\n\n accrual end date.\n   * @return the accrual end date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getAccrualEndDate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getEndDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * LocalDate startDate = stepinDate.isAfter(getAccrualStartDate()) ? stepinDate : getAccrualStartDate();\n    return protectionStart.isBeginning() ? startDate.minusDays(1) : startDate;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the settlement date from the valuation date.\n   * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n   * @param refData  the reference data to use\n   * @return the settlement date\n   */\n  public LocalDate calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(LocalDate valuationDate, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return settlementDateOffset.adjust(valuationDate, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Finds the period that contains the specified date.\n   * @param date  the date to find the period for\n   * @return the period, empty if not found\n   */\n  public Optional<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> findPeriod(LocalDate date) {\n    return paymentPeriods.stream()\n        .filter(p -> p.contains(date))\n        .reduce(ensureOnlyOne());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the accrued year fraction for unit notional.\n   * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\n   * @return the accrued year fraction\n   */\n  public double accruedYearFraction(LocalDate stepinDate) {\n    if (stepinDate.isBefore(getAccrualStartDate())) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    if (stepinDate.isEqual(getAccrualEndDate())) {\n IllegalArgumentException(\"Date outside range\"));\n    return dayCount.relativeYearFraction(period.getStartDate(), stepinDate);\n  }\n\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCds;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTranche;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for CDS tranche trades based on ISDA standard model.\n * <p>\n * The CDS tranche represents a synthetic CDO tranche where loss protection is\n * limited to losses between the attachment and detachment points.\n * <p>\n * The present value is computed by scaling the underlying index CDS present value\n * by the tranche thickness (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint), representing the\n * fraction of the index that this tranche covers.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying CDS product pricer.\n   */\n  private final IsdaCdsProductPricer underlyingPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.underlyingPricer = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return underlyingPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is calculated by pricing the underlying index CDS and\n   * applying the tranche-specific loss allocation factor based on the\n   * attachment and detachment points.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (!trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      return productPv;\n    }\n    Payment upfrontFee = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\n    CurrencyAmount upfrontPv = upfrontPricer.presentValue(upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()));\n    return productPv.plus(upfrontPv);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the tranche is computed as the present value of the\n   * underlying CDS (treated as a single-name CDS with the index credit curve)\n   * scaled by the tranche thickness factor.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    if (!tranche.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate())) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(tranche.getCurrency(), 0d);\n    }\n\n    ResolvedCds cds = tranche.toSingleNameCds();\n    LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\n    LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\n    double recoveryRate = underlyingPricer.recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\n\n    LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities =\n        ratesProvider.survivalProbabilities(cds.getLegalEntityId(), cds.getCurrency());\n    CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(cds.getCurrency());\n\n    // Compute protection leg and risky annuity from the underlying pricer\n    double protectionFull = underlyingPricer.protectionFull(cds, discountFactors, survivalProbabilities, referenceDate, effectiveStartDate);\n    double protectionLeg = (1d - recoveryRate) * protectionFull;\n    double rpv01 = underlyingPricer.riskyAnnuity(cds, discountFactors, survivalProbabilities, referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, priceType);\n\n    // Tranche thickness: the fraction of the index covered\n    double trancheThickness = tranche.getDetachmentPoint() - tranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n\n    // Index factor from the credit curve (if available, or default to 1.0)\n    double indexFactor = getIndexFactor(cds, ratesProvider);\n\n    // Scale the CDS PV by tranche thickness and index factor\n    double signedNotional = cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional());\n    double amount = signedNotional * indexFactor * trancheThickness *\n        (protectionLeg - rpv01 * cds.getFixedRate());\n\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), amount);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value on settlement date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value on settlement date\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueOnSettle(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    return presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculate the settlement date\n  private LocalDate calculateSettlementDate(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return trade.getProduct().calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\n  }\n\n  // get the index factor from the credit rates provider (notional scaling factor)\n  private double getIndexFactor(ResolvedCds cds, CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    try {\n      LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survProbs =\n          ratesProvider.survivalProbabilities(cds.getLegalEntityId(), cds.getCurrency());\n      // Try to get index factor from curve info\n      return survProbs.getSurvivalProbabilities()\n          .findData(com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.CurveInfoType.CDS_INDEX_FACTOR)\n          .orElse(1d);\n    } catch (Exception e) {\n      return 1d;\n    }\n  }\n\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3570,"cache_read_input_tokens":104292,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3570,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"cb4cee24-a503-4996-af38-29b2980ba00c","uuid":"ab762ce7-6391-4feb-b908-28d9a785a6ca"}

ratesProvider);\n\n    // Scale the CDS PV by tranche thickness and index factor\n    double signedNotional = cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional());\n    double amount = signedNotional * indexFactor * trancheThickness *\n        (protectionLeg - rpv01 * cds.getFixedRate());\n\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), amount);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value on settlement date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value on settlement date\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueOnSettle(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    return presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculate the settlement date\n  private LocalDate calculateSettlementDate(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return trade.getProduct().calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\n  }\n\n  // get the index factor from the credit rates provider (notional scaling factor)\n  private double getIndexFactor(ResolvedCds cds, CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    try {\n      LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survProbs =\n          ratesProvider.survivalProbabilities(cds.getLegalEntityId(), cds.getCurrency());\n      // Try to get index factor from curve info\n      return survProbs.getSurvivalProbabilities()\n          .findData(com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.CurveInfoType.CDS_INDEX_FACTOR)\n          .orElse(1d);\n    } catch (Exception e) {\n      return 1d;\n    }\n LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities> rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\n154: \\n155:     PointSensitivityBuilder protectionLegSensi =\\n156:         protectionLegSensitivity(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate, recoveryRate);\\n157:     PointSensitivityBuilder riskyAnnuitySensi =\\n158:         riskyAnnuitySensitivity(cds, date if the product is associated with a {@code Trade}. \\n170:    * <p>\\n171:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty present value, see {@link PriceType}. \\n172:    * If calculating the This method is private to that class.\n\nFor my tranche pricer, I should use the same simplistic approach of the `IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer` but I can just use the public `presentValue` method of `IsdaCdsProductPricer` and scale by tranche thickness.\n\nThe key insight is:\n- The index PV = f * (protection_leg - rpv01 * coupon) * notional\n\n\n- The tranche PV = f * (protection_leg - rpv01 * coupon) * notional * trancheThickness\n\nwhere f is the index factor from the credit curve and trancheThickness is the difference between detachment and attachment points. Since I'm in the same package, I can access the private `reduceDiscountFactors` method to get the index factor, then apply the tranche thickness scaling to the base CDS present value.\n\nActually, I realize the cleanest approach is to delegate to the existing index pricer for the heavy lifting—it already computes the index factor correctly—and then just multiply the result by the tranche thickness. This works because the index PV formula naturally factors into the tranche PV when scaled by thickness. I see that the `IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer` extracts an index factor from the discount rates, but without direct access to that factor, I'll need to use the pricer's overall `presentValue()` method and then scale the result by the tranche thickness to isolate just the tranche's contribution. This follows the homogeneous pool assumption.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying CDS product pricer.\n   */\n  private final IsdaCdsProductPricer underlyingPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.underlyingPricer = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return underlyingPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is calculated from the settlement date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = tranche.calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (!trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      return productPv;\n    }\n    Payment upfrontFee = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\n    CurrencyAmount upfrontPv = upfrontPricer.presentValue(upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()));\n    return productPv.plus(upfrontPv);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value on the settlement date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value on the settlement date\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueOnSettle(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = tranche.calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\n    return presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The tranche PV is computed by scaling the underlying CDS index PV by the\n   * tranche thickness factor (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint). Under the\n   * homogeneous pool assumption, this approximates the expected loss within\n   * the tranche boundaries.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date (typically settlement date)\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    if (!tranche.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate())) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(tranche.getCurrency(), 0d);\n    }\n\n    // Tranche thickness: the fraction of the index covered by this tranche\n    double trancheThickness = tranche.getDetachmentPoint() - tranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n\n    // Price the underlying CDS using the index credit curve\n    ResolvedCds cds = tranche.toSingleNameCds();\n    double price = underlyingPricer.price(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n\n    // Scale PV by tranche thickness: only this fraction of the portfolio is affected\n    double signedNotional = cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional());\n    double amount = signedNotional * trancheThickness * price;\n\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), amount);\n  }\n\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2792,"cache_read_input_tokens":119726,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2792,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":9,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"cb4cee24-a503-4996-af38-29b2980ba00c","uuid":"4b1402fc-f8de-4e29-93bf-29df866de7c0"}

Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The tranche PV is computed by scaling the underlying CDS index PV by the\n   * tranche thickness factor (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint). Under the\n   * homogeneous pool assumption, this approximates the expected loss within\n   * the tranche boundaries.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date (typically settlement date)\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    if (!tranche.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate())) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(tranche.getCurrency(), 0d);\n    }\n\n    // Tranche thickness: the fraction of the index covered by this tranche\n    double trancheThickness = tranche.getDetachmentPoint() - com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport for CDS tranche trades based on ISDA standard model.\n * <p>\n * The CDS tranche represents a synthetic CDO tranche where loss protection is\n * limited to losses between the attachment and detachment the index that this tranche covers.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying CDS product pricer.\n   */\n  private final IsdaCdsProductPricer underlyingPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.underlyingPricer = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return underlyingPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is calculated by pricing the underlying index CDS and\n   * applying the tranche-specific loss allocation factor based on the\n   * attachment and detachment points.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (!trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      return productPv;\n    }\n    Payment upfrontFee = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\n    CurrencyAmount upfrontPv = upfrontPricer.presentValue(upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()));\n    return productPv.plus(upfrontPv);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the tranche is computed as the present value of the\n   * underlying CDS (treated as a single-name CDS with the index credit curve)\n   * scaled by the tranche thickness factor.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    if (!tranche.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate())) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(tranche.getCurrency(), 0d);\n    }\n\n    ResolvedCds cds = tranche.toSingleNameCds();\n    LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\n    LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\n    double recoveryRate = underlyingPricer.recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\n\n    LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities =\n        ratesProvider.survivalProbabilities(cds.getLegalEntityId(), cds.getCurrency());\n    CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(cds.getCurrency());\n\n    // Compute protection leg and risky annuity from the underlying pricer\n    double protectionFull = underlyingPricer.protectionFull(cds, discountFactors, survivalProbabilities, referenceDate, effectiveStartDate);\n    double protectionLeg = (1d - recoveryRate) * protectionFull;\n    double rpv01 = underlyingPricer.riskyAnnuity(cds, discountFactors, survivalProbabilities, referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, priceType);\n\n    // Tranche thickness: the fraction of the index covered\n    double trancheThickness = tranche.getDetachmentPoint() - tranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n\n    // Index factor from the credit curve (if available, or default to 1.0)\n    double indexFactor = getIndexFactor(cds, ratesProvider);\n\n    // Scale the CDS PV by tranche thickness and index factor\n    double signedNotional = cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional());\n    double amount = signedNotional * indexFactor * trancheThickness *\n        (protectionLeg - rpv01 * cds.getFixedRate());\n\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), amount);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value on settlement date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value on settlement date\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueOnSettle(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    return presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculate the settlement date\n  private LocalDate calculateSettlementDate(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return trade.getProduct().calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\n  }\n\n  // get the index factor from the credit rates provider (notional scaling factor)\n  private double getIndexFactor(ResolvedCds cds, CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    try {\n      LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survProbs =\n          ratesProvider.survivalProbabilities(cds.getLegalEntityId(), cds.getCurrency());\n      // Try to get index factor from curve info\n      return survProbs.getSurvivalProbabilities()\n          .findData(com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.CurveInfoType.CDS_INDEX_FACTOR)\n          .orElse(1d);\n    } catch (Exception e) {\n      return 1d;\n    }\n  }\n\n}\n"}}

attachmentPoint),\n * using the index credit curve. This follows the homogeneous pool assumption.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying CDS product pricer.\n   */\n  private final IsdaCdsProductPricer underlyingPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.underlyingPricer = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return underlyingPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is calculated from the settlement date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = tranche.calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\n    CurrencyAmount productPv = presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (!trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      return productPv;\n    }\n    Payment upfrontFee = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\n    CurrencyAmount upfrontPv = upfrontPricer.presentValue(upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()));\n    return productPv.plus(upfrontPv);\n Calculates the present value of the CDS tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The tranche PV is computed by scaling the underlying CDS index PV by the\n   * tranche thickness factor (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint). Under the\n   * homogeneous pool assumption, this approximates the expected loss within\n   * the tranche boundaries.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date (typically settlement date)\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    if (!tranche.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate())) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(tranche.getCurrency(), 0d);\n    }\n\n    // Tranche thickness: the fraction of the index covered by this tranche\n    double trancheThickness = tranche.getDetachmentPoint() - tranche.getAttachmentPoint();\n\n    // Price the underlying CDS using the index credit curve\n    ResolvedCds cds = tranche.toSingleNameCds();\n    double price = underlyingPricer.price(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n\n    // Scale PV by tranche thickness: only this fraction of the portfolio is affected\n    double signedNotional = cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional());\n    double amount = signedNotional * trancheThickness * price;\n\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), amount);\n  }\n\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":88,"oldLines":7,"newStart":88,"newLines":8,"lines":["       return productPv;","     }","     Payment upfrontFee = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();","-    CurrencyAmount upfrontPv = upfrontPricer.presentValue(upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()));","+    CurrencyAmount upfrontPv = upfrontPricer.presentValue(","+        upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors());","     return productPv.plus(upfrontPv);","   }"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

calculations on a single {@code CdsTrancheTrade} for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * An instance of {@link CreditRatesMarketDataLookup} must be specified.\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved target}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the currency of the CDS tranche, which is limited to be single-currency.\n */\npublic class CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<CdsTrancheTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The pricer for {@link ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade}.\n   */\n  private static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer PRICER =\n      new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.CORRECT);\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = ImmutableSet.of(\n      Measures.PRESENT_VALUE,\n      Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET);\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<CdsTrancheTrade> targetType() {\n    return CdsTrancheTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(CdsTrancheTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(CdsTrancheTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return StandardId legalEntityId = product.getCdsIndexId();\n    Currency currency = product.getCurrency();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup lookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    return lookup.requirements(legalEntityId, currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // resolve the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n\n    // use lookup to query market data\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup ledLookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData = ledLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, marketData, refData));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    if (measure.equals(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE)) {\n      return Result.of(() -> CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n          marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n          i -> {\n            CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider = marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider();\n            return PRICER.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, PriceType.DIRTY, refData);\n          }));\n    } else if (measure.equals(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET)) {\n      return Result.success(trade);\n    }\n    return Wraps CdsTranche with TradeInfo and optional upfront fee.\n\n### modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade.java\nNew file following the ResolvedCdsIndexTrade pattern. Wraps ResolvedCdsTranche with TradeInfo and optional Payment.\n\n### modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaCdsTranchePricer.java\nNew pricer that:\n1. Converts the tranche to a single-name CDS via `toSingleNameCds()`\n2. Uses `IsdaCdsProductPricer.price()` to get the underlying price\n3. Scales by `trancheThickness = detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint`\n4. Handles optional upfront fee with `toDiscountFactors()`\n\n### modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/credit/CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction.java\nNew CalculationFunction implementing:\n- `PRESENT_VALUE` — returns `CurrencyScenarioArray` computed via `IsdaCdsTranchePricer.presentValue()`\n- `RESOLVED_TARGET` — returns the resolved trade\n- `requirements()` — delegates to CreditRatesMarketDataLookup using the index ID and currency\n\n## Analysis\n\n### Architecture\nThe CDS Tranche implementation follows the Strata architecture for credit products:\n\n1. **Product layer** (`CdsTranche`, `CdsTrancheTrade`): Immutable Joda-Beans capturing contractual terms. The tranche adds `attachmentPoint` and `detachmentPoint` fields to the standard CDS index structure.\n\n2. **Resolved layer** (`ResolvedCdsTranche`, `ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade`): Expanded forms suitable for pricing, with all business day adjustments applied. Includes the `toSingleNameCds()` method which adapts the tranche to a `ResolvedCds` for use with the standard ISDA pricer.\n\n3. **Pricer layer** (`IsdaCdsTranchePricer`): Uses the homogeneous pool approximation — the tranche is priced as a fraction of the underlying index CDS, where the fraction equals the tranche thickness `(detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint)`. This is consistent with the `IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer` approach.\n\n4. **Measure layer** (`CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction`): Wires the tranche into Strata's scenario calculation engine, supporting present value and resolved target measures.\n\n### Design Decisions\n- The tranche pricing uses the simplest defensible model: scaling the index CDS PV by the tranche thickness. A more accurate model would require a copula-based approach (Gaussian copula or similar) but that goes beyond the ISDA standard model infrastructure already present.\n- The `cdsIndexId` field maps to the credit curve in `CreditRatesProvider`, maintaining compatibility with the existing market data infrastructure.\n- All Joda-Bean boilerplate (Meta class, Builder class, property switch statements) follows the exact same pattern as `CdsIndex` and `ResolvedCdsIndex`, using hand-written code that matches what the annotation processor would generate.\nEOF","description":"Write solution documentation"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":333,"cache_read_input_tokens":137919,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":333,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"cb4cee24-a503-4996-af38-29b2980ba00c","uuid":"ba7cce42-9649-4067-966f-bf78b8e9c501"}
